nav.unreadAria: {count, plural, =1 {# unread conversation} other {# unread conversations}}

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.subtitleInvite: Sign in and we'll take you to the invitation.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Get started with CRM Template for WhatsApp
signup.subtitleInvite: Verify your email, then accept the invitation to join your team.
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to <highlight>{email}</highlight>. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: We've sent a password reset link to <highlight>{email}</highlight>. Please check your inbox.

join.invitedAs: You'll join as <role>{role}</role>. Link valid until {date, date, medium}.
join.acceptFooter: Accepting moves your login into <highlight>{accountName}</highlight>. Your empty personal account from signup will be cleaned up.
join.conflictBody: To join <highlight>{accountName}</highlight>, sign out and sign up again with a different email address. The invite link stays valid as long as it hasn't expired.
join.signOutAndRetry: Sign out & use a different email
join.redeemConflictFallback: You are already in another account. Sign in with a different email to join this one.
join.signOutError: Could not sign out. Try refreshing the page.

notFound.title: Invite not found
notFound.body: This link doesn't match a valid invitation. Double-check the URL or ask the person who invited you to send a new one.

used.title: Invite already used
used.body: This invitation has already been accepted. If that wasn't you, ask the account admin to send a fresh link.

expired.title: Invite expired
expired.body: This invitation has expired. Ask the account admin to send a new one — they take a few seconds to generate.

serverError.title: Something went wrong
serverError.body: We couldn't verify this invitation right now. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
